proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `braf_v600e=1` have more negative `dependency_BRAF` scores than cell lines with `braf_v600e=0`.
Cell lines with `egfr_amplification=1` have more negative `dependency_EGFR` scores than cell lines with `egfr_amplification=0`.
Cell lines with `erbb2_amplification=1` have more negative `dependency_ERBB2` scores than cell lines with `erbb2_amplification=0`.
Cell lines with `kras_mutation=1` have more negative `dependency_KRAS` scores than cell lines with `kras_mutation=0`.

analyses.result_summary: Mean `dependency_BRAF` was -0.8047 in `braf_v600e=1` lines and -0.2495 in `braf_v600e=0` lines; difference=-0.5552, p=<1e-300.
analyses.method: Welch two-sample t-test, driver-positive versus driver-negative

analyses.result_summary: Mean `dependency_EGFR` was -0.6010 in `egfr_amplification=1` lines and -0.2524 in non-amplified lines; difference=-0.3486, p=<1e-300.
analyses.method: Welch two-sample t-test, driver-positive versus driver-negative

analyses.result_summary: Mean `dependency_ERBB2` was -0.6856 in `erbb2_amplification=1` lines and -0.2535 in non-amplified lines; difference=-0.4321, p=<1e-300.
analyses.method: Welch two-sample t-test, driver-positive versus driver-negative

analyses.result_summary: Mean `dependency_KRAS` was -0.5594 in `kras_mutation=1` lines and -0.2520 in wild-type lines; difference=-0.3075, p=<1e-300.
analyses.method: Welch two-sample t-test, driver-positive versus driver-negative

proposed_hypotheses.text: The `braf_v600e=1` effect on `dependency_BRAF` is stronger in `lineage=skin` than in non-skin cell lines.
Within `egfr_amplification=1` cell lines, `rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm>=5.669` is associated with more negative `dependency_EGFR` than lower MYC RNA.
Within `egfr_amplification=1` cell lines, `lineage_subtype=luminal` suppresses EGFR dependency, giving less negative `dependency_EGFR` than other EGFR-amplified lines.
Within `erbb2_amplification=1` cell lines, `lineage_subtype=her2_enriched` has more negative `dependency_ERBB2` than other ERBB2-amplified lines.

analyses.result_summary: OLS interaction `braf_v600e * lineage=skin` for `dependency_BRAF` was -0.0126 with p=0.288; the BRAF V600E effect was not significantly skin-specific.
analyses.method: OLS model with driver, modifier, and driver-by-modifier interaction

analyses.result_summary: Among EGFR-amplified lines, high MYC RNA had mean `dependency_EGFR` -0.6240 versus -0.5937 in lower-MYC EGFR-amplified lines; difference=-0.0303, p=0.0205.
analyses.method: Welch t-test restricted to EGFR-amplified lines

analyses.result_summary: Among EGFR-amplified lines, luminal subtype had mean `dependency_EGFR` -0.5461 versus -0.6047 in other EGFR-amplified lines; positive difference=0.0585 indicates less negative dependency, p=0.0123.
analyses.method: Welch t-test restricted to EGFR-amplified lines

analyses.result_summary: Among ERBB2-amplified lines, HER2-enriched subtype had mean `dependency_ERBB2` -0.7525 versus -0.6836 in other ERBB2-amplified lines; difference=-0.0689, p=0.0243.
analyses.method: Welch t-test restricted to ERBB2-amplified lines

proposed_hypotheses.text: `kras_mutation=1` produces a stronger negative effect on `dependency_KRAS` in `lineage=pancreatic` than in non-pancreatic cell lines.
Cell lines with `nf1_loss=1` have more negative `dependency_RIT1` scores than cell lines with `nf1_loss=0`.
Among `nf1_loss=1` cell lines, `lineage=brain` has more negative `dependency_RIT1` than other NF1-loss lines.
Among `nf1_loss=1` cell lines, `egfr_amplification=1` suppresses RIT1 dependency, yielding less negative `dependency_RIT1` than NF1-loss/EGFR-nonamplified lines.

analyses.result_summary: OLS interaction `kras_mutation * lineage=pancreatic` for `dependency_KRAS` was -0.0028, p=0.795; the KRAS mutation effect was not detectably pancreatic-specific.
analyses.method: OLS model with driver, modifier, and driver-by-modifier interaction

analyses.result_summary: Mean `dependency_RIT1` was -0.3527 in `nf1_loss=1` lines versus -0.2572 in NF1-retained lines; difference=-0.0955, p=1.55e-68.
analyses.method: Welch two-sample t-test, NF1-loss versus NF1-retained

analyses.result_summary: Within NF1-loss lines, brain lineage had mean `dependency_RIT1` -0.4047 versus -0.3487 in other NF1-loss lines; difference=-0.0560, p=0.00432.
analyses.method: Welch t-test restricted to NF1-loss lines

analyses.result_summary: Within NF1-loss lines, EGFR amplification had mean `dependency_RIT1` -0.3153 versus -0.3559 in EGFR-nonamplified NF1-loss lines; positive difference=0.0405, p=0.0344.
analyses.method: Welch t-test restricted to NF1-loss lines

proposed_hypotheses.text: `lineage=colorectal` cell lines have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than non-colorectal cell lines.
Within `lineage=colorectal` cell lines, `apc_mutation=1` enables stronger KIF18A dependency than `apc_mutation=0`.
Within `lineage=colorectal` cell lines, `wnt_activity_score>=0.819` enables stronger KIF18A dependency than lower WNT activity.

analyses.result_summary: Colorectal lines had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -0.7204 versus -0.2524 in non-colorectal lines; difference=-0.4680, p=<1e-300.
analyses.method: Welch t-test, colorectal lineage versus all other lineages

analyses.result_summary: Within colorectal lines, APC-mutant lines had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -0.9425 versus -0.2592 in APC-wild-type colorectal lines; difference=-0.6833, p=<1e-300.
analyses.method: Welch t-test restricted to colorectal lineage

analyses.result_summary: Within colorectal lines, top-quartile WNT activity had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -0.9288 versus -0.2590 in lower-WNT colorectal lines; difference=-0.6698, p=<1e-300.
analyses.method: Welch t-test restricted to colorectal lineage

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within `lineage=colorectal` and `apc_mutation=1` cell lines, `smad4_loss=1` suppresses KIF18A dependency, giving less negative `dependency_KIF18A` than `smad4_loss=0`.
The complete subgroup `lineage=colorectal`, `apc_mutation=1`, `wnt_activity_score>=0.819`, and `smad4_loss=0` has much more negative `dependency_KIF18A` than all other cell lines.

analyses.result_summary: Within colorectal/APC-mutant lines, SMAD4-loss lines had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -0.2516 versus -1.0922 in SMAD4-retained lines; positive difference=0.8406, p=<1e-300.
analyses.method: Welch t-test restricted to colorectal/APC-mutant lines

analyses.result_summary: The colorectal/APC-mutant/WNT-high/SMAD4-retained subgroup had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -1.2990 versus -0.2530 in all other lines; difference=-1.0460, p=<1e-300.
analyses.method: Welch t-test for complete four-predicate subgroup versus complement

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `myc_amplification=1` have more negative `dependency_RPL11` than cell lines with `myc_amplification=0`.
Within `myc_amplification=1` cell lines, `growth_rate_doublings_per_day>=0.964` further increases RPL11 dependency, making `dependency_RPL11` more negative.
Within `myc_amplification=1` cell lines, `copy_number_8q24>=0.428` further increases RPL11 dependency, making `dependency_RPL11` more negative.

analyses.result_summary: MYC-amplified lines had mean `dependency_RPL11` -0.3614 versus -0.2523 in non-amplified lines; difference=-0.1091, p=5.71e-140.
analyses.method: Welch t-test, MYC-amplified versus non-amplified

analyses.result_summary: Within MYC-amplified lines, high-growth lines had mean `dependency_RPL11` -0.3936 versus -0.3464; difference=-0.0471, p=2.67e-08.
analyses.method: Welch t-test restricted to MYC-amplified lines

analyses.result_summary: Within MYC-amplified lines, high 8q24 copy number had mean `dependency_RPL11` -0.3647 versus -0.2628; difference=-0.1018, p=1.34e-06.
analyses.method: Welch t-test restricted to MYC-amplified lines

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm>=5.669` have more negative `dependency_DHX9` than lower-MYC-RNA cell lines.
The subgroup with both `rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm>=5.669` and `growth_rate_doublings_per_day>=0.964` has more negative `dependency_DHX9` than all other cell lines.
Within high-MYC-RNA cell lines, `growth_rate_doublings_per_day>=0.964` further increases DHX9 dependency.

analyses.result_summary: Top-quartile MYC RNA lines had mean `dependency_DHX9` -0.3551 versus -0.3265; difference=-0.0286, p=2.05e-15.
analyses.method: Welch t-test, top-quartile MYC RNA versus lower MYC RNA

analyses.result_summary: The high-MYC/high-growth subgroup had mean `dependency_DHX9` -0.3892 versus -0.3297 in all other lines; difference=-0.0595, p=2.48e-21.
analyses.method: Welch t-test for two-predicate subgroup versus complement

analyses.result_summary: Within high-MYC-RNA lines, high-growth lines had mean `dependency_DHX9` -0.3892 versus -0.3428; difference=-0.0464, p=4.50e-11.
analyses.method: Welch t-test restricted to top-quartile MYC RNA lines

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `growth_rate_doublings_per_day>=0.964` have more negative `dependency_POLR2A` than lower-growth cell lines.
Cell lines with `growth_rate_doublings_per_day>=0.964` have more negative `dependency_TMED10` than lower-growth cell lines.
Within high-growth cell lines, `lineage_subtype=basal` suppresses TMED10 dependency, giving less negative `dependency_TMED10` than other high-growth lines.

analyses.result_summary: High-growth lines had mean `dependency_POLR2A` -0.4972 versus -0.3928; difference=-0.1043, p=1.01e-179.
analyses.method: Welch t-test, top-quartile growth versus lower growth

analyses.result_summary: High-growth lines had mean `dependency_TMED10` -0.2816 versus -0.2447; difference=-0.0369, p=2.52e-24.
analyses.method: Welch t-test, top-quartile growth versus lower growth

analyses.result_summary: Within high-growth lines, basal subtype had mean `dependency_TMED10` -0.2420 versus -0.2833 in other high-growth lines; positive difference=0.0413, p=0.00716.
analyses.method: Welch t-test restricted to top-quartile growth lines

proposed_hypotheses.text: A systematic predicate search identifies `braf_v600e=1` as the best-supported subgroup for more negative `dependency_BRAF`.
A systematic predicate search identifies `egfr_amplification=1` as the best-supported subgroup for more negative `dependency_EGFR`.
A systematic predicate search identifies `erbb2_amplification=1` as the best-supported subgroup for more negative `dependency_ERBB2`.
A systematic predicate search identifies `kras_mutation=1` as the best-supported subgroup for more negative `dependency_KRAS`.
A systematic predicate search identifies the subgroup `nf1_loss=1` and `lineage=brain` for especially negative `dependency_RIT1`.
A systematic predicate search identifies `lineage=colorectal`, `apc_mutation=1`, `wnt_activity_score>=0.819`, and `smad4_loss=0` for especially negative `dependency_KIF18A`.
A systematic predicate search identifies `growth_rate_doublings_per_day>=0.964` and `lineage=prostate` as a concentrated subgroup for more negative `dependency_TMED10`.
A systematic predicate search identifies `rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm>=5.669` and `growth_rate_doublings_per_day>=0.964` as a concentrated subgroup for more negative `dependency_DHX9`.
A systematic predicate search identifies `growth_rate_doublings_per_day>=0.964` as the best-supported subgroup for more negative `dependency_POLR2A`.
A systematic predicate search identifies `myc_amplification=1` and `growth_rate_doublings_per_day>=0.964` as a concentrated subgroup for more negative `dependency_RPL11`.

analyses.result_summary: Systematic heterogeneity search over single and pairwise predicates selected the driver event `braf_v600e=1` as the interpretable BRAF subgroup; effect=-0.5552, p=<1e-300.
analyses.method: Systematic single/pair predicate scan across all dependency outcomes; min subgroup size 300

analyses.result_summary: Systematic heterogeneity search selected `egfr_amplification=1` as the EGFR subgroup; effect=-0.3486, p=<1e-300.
analyses.method: Systematic single/pair predicate scan across all dependency outcomes; min subgroup size 300

analyses.result_summary: Systematic heterogeneity search selected `erbb2_amplification=1` as the ERBB2 subgroup; effect=-0.4321, p=<1e-300.
analyses.method: Systematic single/pair predicate scan across all dependency outcomes; min subgroup size 300

analyses.result_summary: Systematic heterogeneity search selected `kras_mutation=1` as the KRAS subgroup; effect=-0.3075, p=<1e-300.
analyses.method: Systematic single/pair predicate scan across all dependency outcomes; min subgroup size 300

analyses.result_summary: Systematic heterogeneity search found NF1-loss brain lines had mean `dependency_RIT1` -0.4047 versus -0.2650 in all other lines; effect=-0.1397, p=1.01e-12.
analyses.method: Systematic single/pair predicate scan across all dependency outcomes; min subgroup size 300

analyses.result_summary: Systematic heterogeneity search refined KIF18A to colorectal/APC-mutant/WNT-high/SMAD4-retained lines; effect=-1.0460, p=<1e-300.
analyses.method: Systematic single/pair predicate scan followed by complete subgroup refinement

analyses.result_summary: Systematic heterogeneity search found high-growth prostate lines had mean `dependency_TMED10` -0.3067 versus -0.2533 in all other lines; effect=-0.0533, p=1.12e-04.
analyses.method: Systematic single/pair predicate scan across all dependency outcomes; min subgroup size 300

analyses.result_summary: Systematic heterogeneity search found high-MYC/high-growth lines had mean `dependency_DHX9` -0.3892 versus -0.3297; effect=-0.0595, p=2.48e-21.
analyses.method: Systematic single/pair predicate scan across all dependency outcomes; min subgroup size 300

analyses.result_summary: Systematic heterogeneity search selected high growth as the POLR2A subgroup; effect=-0.1043, p=1.01e-179.
analyses.method: Systematic single/pair predicate scan across all dependency outcomes; min subgroup size 300

analyses.result_summary: Systematic heterogeneity search found MYC-amplified/high-growth lines had mean `dependency_RPL11` -0.3936 versus -0.2632; effect=-0.1303, p=1.10e-68.
analyses.method: Systematic single/pair predicate scan across all dependency outcomes; min subgroup size 300

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for `lineage`, `culture_type`, `screen_batch`, `cas9_activity_score`, and `growth_rate_doublings_per_day`, `braf_v600e=1` remains associated with more negative `dependency_BRAF`.

After adjusting for `lineage`, `culture_type`, `screen_batch`, `cas9_activity_score`, and `growth_rate_doublings_per_day`, `egfr_amplification=1` remains associated with more negative `dependency_EGFR`.

After adjusting for `lineage`, `culture_type`, `screen_batch`, `cas9_activity_score`, and `growth_rate_doublings_per_day`, `erbb2_amplification=1` remains associated with more negative `dependency_ERBB2`.
After adjusting for `lineage`, `culture_type`, `screen_batch`, `cas9_activity_score`, and `growth_rate_doublings_per_day`, `kras_mutation=1` remains associated with more negative `dependency_KRAS`.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS coefficient for `braf_v600e` on `dependency_BRAF` was -0.5545, p=<1e-300, model R2=0.202.
analyses.method: OLS adjusted for lineage, culture_type, screen_batch, cas9 activity, and growth rate

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS coefficient for `egfr_amplification` on `dependency_EGFR` was -0.3489, p=<1e-300, model R2=0.071.
analyses.method: OLS adjusted for lineage, culture_type, screen_batch, cas9 activity, and growth rate

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS coefficient for `erbb2_amplification` on `dependency_ERBB2` was -0.4325, p=<1e-300, model R2=0.121.
analyses.method: OLS adjusted for lineage, culture_type, screen_batch, cas9 activity, and growth rate

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS coefficient for `kras_mutation` on `dependency_KRAS` was -0.3095, p=<1e-300, model R2=0.127.
analyses.method: OLS adjusted for lineage, culture_type, screen_batch, cas9 activity, and growth rate
